channel.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs May 24th - May 30th, 2021
item.description:
Languages

  • Piet - Language in which programs look like abstract paintings using colors as code. Named after Piet Mondrian.
  • RASELstars3 - Fungeoid with no limits on program space, float precision, and with a bit of random access to stack.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs May 3rd - May 9th, 2021
item.description:
Languages

  • FlipJumpstars3 - 1 instruction: Flip a bit, then Jump. The simplest OISC.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Mar 22nd - Mar 28th, 2021
item.description:
Languages

  • FreakCstars40 - Full-blown programming language with NSFW contents and memes.
  • JellyScriptstars6 - Brainfuck-based with delicious jelly.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Dec 28th - Jan 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Languages

  • Watsonstars260 - Stack-based Turing-incomplete configuration files.
  • C Flatstars2 - Musical language focused on sound rather than notation with creative freedom in mind.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Oct 5th - Oct 11th, 2020
item.description:
Languages

  • legit - Programs defined entirely by the graph of the git repository instead of its contents.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Sep 28th - Oct 4th, 2020
item.description:
Languages

  • Technologic - Language in which programs look like the lyrics to the Daft Punk song Technologic.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Aug 17th - Aug 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Languages

  • Bracketsstars2 - Language made of brackets, a lot of brackets.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Aug 10th - Aug 16th, 2020
item.description:
Languages

  • Trustars3 - A stack-based language with prefix-free brackets.
  • Dotsstars4 - A turing-complete language using "." symbol only.
  • Japtstars60 - Reduced JavaScript for golfing.
  • Jellystars567 - Golfing language based on J.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Jul 6th - Jul 12th, 2020
item.description:
Languages

  • Nistars7 - Brainfuck-based with more helpful instructions.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Jun 1st - Jun 7th, 2020
item.description:
Languages

  • AlmostBinarystars6 - Code in binary and run on any platform.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs May 11th - May 17th, 2020
item.description:
Languages

  • 1+ - A surprisingly user-friendly language with a highly-limited instruction set.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs May 4th - May 10th, 2020
item.description:
Languages

  • Spooky - The scariest programming language 🎃 💀.

    • Others

  • vapor.jsstars1.3k - The World's Smallest & Fastest JavaScript Library.
  • asmbfstars55 - The only true brainfuck assembler toolkit.
  • NoCodestars47.1k - Secure and reliable applications. Write nothing; deploy nowhere.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Apr 27th - May 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Languages

  • TrumpScriptstars7.3k - Make Python great again.
  • INTERCAL - Parody language intended to be completely different from other languages.
  • ajsone - Language defined completely in JSON.
  • 文言 (Wenyan) - Closely follows the grammar and tone of classical Chinese literature.
  • Foldersstars236 - Code written with folders.

    • Community

  • Code Golf Stack Exchange - Golfing problems and answers.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Apr 20th - Apr 26th, 2020
item.description:
Languages

  • ArnoldC - Based on the best one-liners of Arnold Schwarzenegger.

    • Community

  • Anarchy Golf - Informal golfing problems server.

    • Others

  • CSS-only-chatstars5.7k - A truly monstrous async web chat using no JS whatsoever on the frontend.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Apr 6th - Apr 12th, 2020
item.description:
Languages

  • 78stars2 - A single-character command language focused around the numbers 7 and 8.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Jan 20th - Jan 26th, 2020
item.description:
Languages

  • Golfscript - Stack oriented, aimed at solving problems in as few keystrokes as possible.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Jan 13th - Jan 19th, 2020
item.description:
Languages

  • Turtlestars4 - Uses long-term storage for memory use.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Jan 6th - Jan 12th, 2020
item.description:
Others

  • Petrovich - Operating System concept based on random actions and rewards/punishments.
  • FizzBuzzEnterpriseEditionstars14.5k - Simple FizzBuzz game implemented under the most strict enterprise standards.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Dec 23rd - Dec 29th, 2019
item.description:
Languages

  • WordLangstars0 - A language based on meaning-like grammar that produces output.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Dec 9th - Dec 15th, 2019
item.description:
Languages

  • ZOMBIE - Inherently evil multithreaded language designed for Necromancers.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Oct 28th - Nov 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Languages

  • Haifu - Designed with the core values of Easter philosophy in mind.
  • Fugue - Music as source code.
  • Monicellistars1.1k - Programming using Italian-like gibberish.

    • Algorithms

  • Stacksort - Sorts a list by searching answers in Stack Overflow and executing code snippets until is sorted.
  • πfsstars5.3k - Pi-based storage system, store your data by searching a matching sequence in pi.

    • Resources

  • Esolang List of ideas - Compilation of ideas for esoteric languages and related.

    • Articles

  • On the Turing Completeness Of MS PowerPoint - Turing Machine on PowerPoint.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Oct 14th - Oct 20th, 2019
item.description:
Languages

  • Unlambda - Obfuscated functional programming.
  • Lazy K - Minimal, turing-complete pure functional language without extra features.
  • Orca - Livecoding environment to quickly create procedural audio sequencers.

    • Articles

  • Six programming paradigms that will change how you think about coding - Post by Yevgeniy Brikman describing different programming paradigms that are not commonly applied.
  • The Fun (and Madness) of Esoteric Programming Languages - Straightforward introduction to esoteric languages with examples.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Aug 12th - Aug 18th, 2019
item.description:
Languages

  • Vigilstars2.4k - Only Vigil is truly vigilant about not allowing code that fails to pass programmatic specifications.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Jan 28th - Feb 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Resources

  • Esoteric Codes - Articles and documents collection.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Dec 3rd - Dec 9th, 2018
item.description:
Languages

  • Charcoalstars151 - Concise language for sketching ASCII art.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Sep 24th - Sep 30th, 2018
item.description:
Languages

  • Chicken - Only 1 valid symbol: 'chicken'.
  • Thuestars8 - Matrioshka language based on nondeterministic string rewriting of a semi-Thue grammar.

    • Resources

  • DM's Esoteric Programming Languages - List of esoteric languages and algorithms written by dangermouse.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Aug 27th - Sep 2nd, 2018
item.description:
Languages

  • Rockstarstars25 - Designed for creating computer programs that are also song lyrics.
  • Enterprise™stars1.5k - Non deterministic unnecessarily statically typed language.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Mar 5th - Mar 11th, 2018
item.description:
Languages

  • Omgrofl - Syntax resembling Internet slang.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Jan 22nd - Jan 28th, 2018
item.description:
Languages

  • Emojicode - Full-blown programming language consisting of emojis.
  • Fetlangstars1.4k - Designed such that source code looks like poorly written fetish erotica.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Sep 4th - Sep 10th, 2017
item.description:
Languages

  • Z - Use only the letter z.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Apr 24th - Apr 30th, 2017
item.description:
Resources

  • Rosettacode - Provides examples in different languages, including esoteric languages.

    • Articles

  • Let's Build a Basic Interpreter (Ruslan's Blog) - Series of articles explaining the basics of compilers and interpreters and how to build one.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Apr 17th - Apr 23rd, 2017
item.description:
Community

  • Freenode IRC Channel - The #esoteric IRC channel on freenode.
  • Reddit Esolangs - Reddit community on esolangs.

    • Languages

  • Befunge - Two-dimensional language.
  • Brainfuck - Minimalist language using only 8 single-character commands.
  • Chef - Programs that look like cooking recipes.
  • JSFuckstars5.9k - Esoteric programming style based on the atomic parts of JavaScript.
  • reMorse - Morse-styled language.
  • Shakespeare - Language where the code appear to be Shakespearean plays.
  • Whitespace - Use only white-characters (space, tabs and newlines).

    • Resources

  • Esolang - Wiki of esoteric programming languages and related Resources.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Apr 10th - Apr 16th, 2017
item.description:
Languages

  • Suzystars7 - 3D language inspired in Befunge.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Mar 13th - Mar 19th, 2017
item.description:
Languages

  • ChuckScriptstars30 - Unary-based language, where the code is a single number.
  • DNA# - Language based on the structure of the DNA.
  • False - Heavily offuscated language with a minimal implementation.
  • LolCode - Language with keywords based on the lolcat meme expressions.
  • Ook! - Brainfuck-based language, where the commands are orangutan words.
  • Unary - Brainfuck-based language where all the commands are 0.
  • Velato - Language that uses MIDI files as source, programs are defined by the pitch and order of notes.
  • Whenever - Language that does things whenever it wants.

    • Resources

  • Wikipedia/Esoteric programming languages - Wikipedia list of esoteric languages.

item.title: angrykoala/awesome-esolangs Feb 27th - Mar 5th, 2017
item.description:
Languages

  • Malbolge - Named after the 8th level of hell, is designed to be as difficult as possible to program.

    • Resources

  • Esofilesstars59 - The Esoteric Files Archive, an archive of implementations of esoteric programming languages and examples.
